calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR RE-HEARING OF SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL MATTER HELD ON WED., OCT-10-2012:

STIPULATION SIGNED BY BOTH SIDES AT PREVIOUS HEARING. DANIEL BORNSTEIN, ESQ. APPEARS FOR APPELLENT BUFFY MAGUIRE, ALSO PRESENT THIS DATE. ERIC H. MILLIKEN, ESQ. APPEARS FOR RESPONDENT JOSEPH CONNELLY, ALSO PRESENT THIS DATE. ALL PARTIES ADMINISTERED THE OATH BY THE CLERK.

THE COURT HEARS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH COUNSEL, IN ADDITION TO STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY THE PARTIES; DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS PRESENTED TO THE COURT FOR ITS REVIEW AND IS NOT RETURNED TO COUNSEL THIS DATE.

THE COURT THEN HEARS CLOSING STATEMENTS PRESENTED AND SUBMITTED BY BOTH COUNSEL. AFTER HEARING ALL STATEMENTS OF COUNSEL AND PARTIES, AND AFTER RECEIVING ALL DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AND RETAINS ALL EVIDENCE.

JPT SHARON O'GRADY; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D-525).

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Continued To Oct-10-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-14-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 09:15am

Judge Pro Tem Sharon O'Grady, clerk- Julie Rumsey, nothing on the record, dept 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Buffy Maguire appearing with Counsel, Daniel Bornstein. Respondent, Joseph Connelly does not appear. Party previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge O'Grady.

Appellant's Counsel gives a brief summary of case.

The matter is submitted.

09:25am

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-03-2012 Judgment Entered
